/dep.js(3,16): error TS7006: Parameter 'module' implicitly has an 'any' type.


==== /main.ts (0 errors) ====
    import dep = require("./dep.js");
    
    export const r = dep.real;
    
==== /dep.js (1 errors) ====
    module.exports = { real: true };
    
    function setup(module) {
                   ~~~~~~
!!! error TS7006: Parameter 'module' implicitly has an 'any' type.
        module.exports = { configured: true };
